sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id Int32, event_time String);
SELECT id, parseDateTime32BestEffortOrZero(event_time) AS parsed_time FROM test_dates;
UPDATE test_dates SET event_time = '2023-05-20 08:45:00' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, event_time, parseDateTime32BestEffortOrZero(event_time) AS processed_time FROM test_dates ORDER BY id;
